display_information.name: Oracle
display_information.description: Autonomous workspace intelligence layer. Detects emerging signals, enriches with system context, and delivers actionable briefs.
display_information.long_description: Oracle monitors your Slack workspace in real time. It detects cross-channel signal patterns, enriches them with external system context from GitHub and Jira via MCP, scores confidence, and delivers structured briefs to the right person at the right moment — with one-click action buttons.

slash_commands.description: Check Oracle system health, queue depths, and fire rate
